name: JiraIntegration
description: JiraIntegration schema from Palo Alto Networks SaaS Security Posture Management API

id.description: Unique identifier of the Jira integration.

jira_url.description: Base URL of the Jira server or cloud instance.

project_key.description: Jira project key where tickets are created.

issue_type.description: Jira issue type for created tickets (e.g., Bug, Task).

enabled.description: Whether the integration is actively creating tickets.
